message.content: This section fragment addresses the scope of the "Community Safety" topic, specifying that it applies globally to all games released on the Nintendo platform. It contains navigational or interface prompts ("Book Online," "Visit Site") and references page 23. The text does not include specific dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, quantitative metrics, or evidence types. It can primarily answer retrieval questions regarding the covered entity/platform (Nintendo), geographic applicability (Global), and document location (Page 23) within the broader Community Safety section.
